structured_resume.headline: Senior Backend Engineer

experience.title: Software Engineer
highlights: Built REST APIs with FastAPI serving 2M+ requests/day
Led Postgres schema design and pgvector rollout

structured_resume.summary_excerpt: Backend engineer focused on scalable APIs and data systems.

professional_summary: Backend-focused software engineer with several years building high-traffic APIs and relational data models. Experience spans Python/FastAPI ecosystems, PostgreSQL, and cloud deployment patterns. Education in computer science supports strong fundamentals. Resume would benefit from clearer metrics and leadership examples to compete for senior-plus roles.
strengths: Clear technical stack alignment with backend roles
Concrete stack keywords for ATS (Python, Postgres, AWS)
Progressive responsibility implied by scale metrics
weaknesses: Limited quantified business outcomes on some bullets
Leadership and cross-functional examples are thin
Education section could list GPA or honors only if true—currently sparse

ats_compatibility.formatting_notes: Plain-text extraction; ensure one-column layout in source PDF for best ATS parsing.
suggestions: Mirror keywords from target job descriptions in a Skills section
Use standard section headings: Experience, Education, Skills

skills_assessment.proficiency_notes: Depth appears strongest in API and data layers; broaden explicit DevOps and observability terms if applicable.

gaps.gap_description: No explicit mention of OpenTelemetry, Datadog, or similar.
No direct reports or mentoring called out.

skill_gap_analysis.industry_context: For staff/principal backend tracks, recruiters often expect measurable impact and broader system ownership.

career_outlook: With continued depth in distributed systems and measurable product impact, a realistic 5–10 year path could include senior/staff backend roles or technical lead tracks. Adding leadership narrative and cross-team delivery stories would widen options toward engineering management if desired.
improvement_suggestions: Add 1–2 metrics per role (latency, cost, reliability, revenue)
Add a single line on collaboration (PM, design, data science)
Tighten top summary to 3 lines with role target and domain

course_recommendations.title: Designing Data-Intensive Applications (book)
course_recommendations.rationale: Strengthens system-design narrative for senior interviews.

course_recommendations.title: AWS Certified Developer – Associate
course_recommendations.rationale: Formal signal if cloud ownership is a gap for target employers.
